product_overview: Sudan Free is a Flutter mobile freelance marketplace connecting Sudanese freelancers, clients, and shops via job listings, proposals, social feed, chat, and payment tracking. The backend uses Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Storage, Messaging) with Cloud Functions for notifications and Cloudinary for media.
core_goals: Enable secure user authentication and robust profile management for freelancers, clients, and shops
Support full job lifecycle: post jobs, submit and manage proposals, complete jobs and track payments
Provide social engagement via posts, comments, reactions and push notifications
Enable real-time chat between users and a discoverable marketplace via smart search and location filters
Ensure safety and moderation with reporting, reviews/ratings, and privacy settings
Support offline caching and efficient media handling while relying on Firestore security rules

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User authentication and account lifecycle: sign up/in with Google or Email, sign out, password reset, and account deletion.
user_flows: POST /auth/signUpWithEmail with {email,password} -> Receive 200 UserCredential -> POST /auth/signInWithEmail with {email,password} -> Receive 200 UserCredential and auth token
POST /auth/signInWithGoogle -> Receive 200 UserCredential and auth token
POST /auth/signOut with valid auth token -> Receive 200 void
POST /auth/resetPassword with {email} -> Receive 200 void
DELETE /auth/deleteUser with valid auth token and recent login -> Receive 200 void
POST /auth/signInWithEmail with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Invalid credentials
DELETE /auth/deleteUser without recent login -> Receive 400 Requires recent login

features.name: User Management
features.description: CRUD operations for user profiles, listing freelancers and shops, and toggling partner relationships.
user_flows: POST /auth/signInWithEmail with valid credentials -> Receive 200 UserCredential and token -> GET /users/{userId} with token -> Receive 200 UserModel
POST /auth/signInWithEmail with token -> PUT /users/{userId} with token and {name,bio,skills,location} -> Receive 200 void
POST /auth/signInWithEmail with token -> GET /users/freelancers with token?q=skill:plumbing -> Receive 200 UserModel[]
POST /auth/signInWithEmail with token -> POST /users/{userId}/partner with token -> Receive 200 void
GET /users/{userId} with token for non-existent userId -> Receive 404 User not found
GET /users/{userId} without auth token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Job Management
features.description: Create, browse, update, delete and complete job listings with filters and status updates.
user_flows: POST /auth/signInWithEmail with client credentials -> Receive 200 token -> POST /jobs with token and {title,description,budget,category,location} -> Receive 200 void -> GET /jobs with token?category=design -> Receive 200 JobModel[]
POST /auth/signInWithEmail with token -> GET /jobs/{jobId} with token -> Receive 200 JobModel
POST /auth/signInWithEmail with token -> POST /jobs/{jobId}/complete with token -> Receive 200 void
POST /jobs without auth token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /jobs/{jobId} with token for invalid jobId -> Receive 404 Job not found

features.name: Proposal Management
features.description: Freelancers submit proposals for jobs; clients view, accept, or reject proposals and assign freelancers.
user_flows: POST /auth/signInWithEmail with freelancer credentials -> Receive 200 token -> POST /proposals with token and {jobId,coverLetter,proposedBudget,timeline} -> Receive 200 void
POST /auth/signInWithEmail with client credentials -> Receive 200 token -> GET /jobs/{jobId}/proposals with token -> Receive 200 ProposalModel[]

POST /auth/signInWithEmail with client token -> PUT /proposals/{proposalId}/status with token and {status:'accepted'} -> Receive 200 void -> POST /proposals/{proposalId}/accept with token -> Receive 200 void
POST /proposals with token referencing non-existent jobId -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Social Posts
features.description: Create and consume a social feed: posts with optional media, comments, threaded replies, and reactions.
user_flows: POST /auth/signInWithEmail with token -> POST /posts with token and {content,imageUrls,videoUrl} -> Receive 200 void -> GET /posts with token -> Receive 200 PostModel[]
POST /auth/signInWithEmail with token -> POST /posts/{postId}/comments with token and {text,parentCommentId?} -> Receive 200 void
POST /auth/signInWithEmail with token -> POST /posts/{postId}/react with token -> Receive 200 void
POST /posts with invalid imageUrls or malformed body -> Receive 400 Validation error
POST /posts/{postId}/comments with token on non-existent postId -> Receive 404 Post not found

features.name: Shops & Products
features.description: Shop profile creation and discovery; shop owners manage products (profile-level APIs present; product-specific endpoints are implemented client-side via shop profile).
user_flows: POST /auth/signInWithEmail with owner credentials -> Receive 200 token -> PUT /users/{userId} with token and {accountType:'shop',shopDetails:{name,description}} -> Receive 200 void -> GET /users/shops with token?category=clothing -> Receive 200 UserModel[]
PUT /users/{userId} without auth token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /users/shops with token and unsupported filter -> Receive 200 UserModel[] (possibly empty)

features.name: Chat & Messaging
features.description: Real-time chat between users with chat creation, paginated messages, sending messages, and read receipts.
user_flows: POST /auth/signInWithEmail with token -> POST /chats with token and {user2Id} -> Receive 200 ChatDocument -> POST /chats/{chatId}/messages with token and {text} -> Receive 200 void -> GET /chats/{chatId}/messages with token?page=1 -> Receive 200 MessageModel[]
POST /auth/signInWithEmail with token -> GET /chats with token -> Receive 200 ChatDocument[]
POST /chats/{chatId}/messages without auth token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /chats/{chatId}/messages with token for invalid chatId -> Receive 404 Chat not found

features.name: Payment System
features.description: Record and track payments related to jobs; supports creating payment records and updating status (no gateway integration).
user_flows: POST /auth/signInWithEmail with client token -> POST /payments with token and {jobId,amount,freelancerId} -> Receive 200 void -> GET /payments/{paymentId} with token -> Receive 200 PaymentModel
POST /auth.signInWithEmail with token -> PUT /payments/{paymentId}/status with token and {status:'completed'} -> Receive 200 void
GET /payments/{paymentId} with token for non-existent paymentId -> Receive 404 Payment not found

features.name: Reviews & Ratings
features.description: Clients submit reviews for freelancers/shops after job completion; writing reviews updates freelancer stats and rating aggregates.
user_flows: POST /auth/signInWithEmail with client token -> POST /reviews with token and {freelancerId,rating,comment,jobId} -> Receive 200 void -> GET /users/{freelancerId}/reviews with token -> Receive 200 ReviewModel[]
POST /reviews with rating outside allowed range -> Receive 400 Validation error
GET /users/{userId}/reviews with token for non-existent userId -> Receive 404 User not found

features.name: Push Notifications (Cloud Functions)
features.description: Firestore-triggered Cloud Function that sends FCM push notifications when notification documents are created.
user_flows: POST /notifications (Firestore trigger) by creating notification document -> Cloud Function reads document and sends FCM to recipient token -> Receive 200 with FCM response
POST /notifications (Firestore trigger) with missing recipient FCM token -> Cloud Function attempts send, logs failure and returns 200 with error details

features.name: Report System
features.description: Users can report content or other users for moderation and safety via report submissions.
user_flows: POST /auth/signInWithEmail with token -> POST /reports with token and {reportedId,reason,type} -> Receive 200 void
POST /reports without auth token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Smart Search
features.description: Search across jobs, freelancers, shops, and posts with query and type filters to improve discovery.
user_flows: POST /auth/signInWithEmail with token -> GET /search?q=graphic+designer&type=freelancers with token -> Receive 200 SearchResults
GET /search?q=&type=jobs with token (empty q) -> Receive 400 Validation error
GET /search without auth token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User authentication via Google Sign-In, Email/Password, and Phone OTP

endpoints.description: Delete user account and all associated data

Mark job as completed and update freelancer stats

Get all proposals for a job
Accept proposal and assign freelancer to job

features.name: Smart Search

known_limitations.issue: No server-side input validation for Firestore writes
known_limitations.impact: Relies on client-side validation and Firestore security rules

known_limitations.issue: No rate limiting on API calls
known_limitations.impact: Potential for abuse via rapid requests

known_limitations.issue: Payment system has no real payment gateway integration
known_limitations.impact: Payment tracking only, no actual payment processing
